INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
FOREIGN_KEY_VIOLATION: This record is referenced by other data and cannot be changed.
SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired or been terminated. Please sign in again.
REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: The refresh token is invalid or has expired.
GOOGLE_ONLY_ACCOUNT: This account uses Google sign-in. Please continue with Google.
OAUTH_FAILED: Google authentication failed. Please try again.
INVALID_GOOGLE_PROFILE: The Google profile data is invalid.
TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
FORBIDDEN: You do not have access to this resource.
INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You do not have permission to perform this action.
OTP_EXPIRED: The verification code has expired or is invalid.
OTP_GENERATION_FAILED: Failed to generate a verification code. Please try again.
RESET_CODE_INVALID: The password reset code is invalid.
RESET_CODE_EXPIRED: The password reset code has expired.
USER_EMAIL_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
USER_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email address first.
ROLE_ALREADY_EXISTS: A role with this name already exists.
PERMISSION_NOT_FOUND: One or more permissions were not found.
FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file is too large. Maximum allowed size is {limit}.
FILE_UPLOAD_FAILED: File upload failed. Please try again.
FILE_FETCH_FAILED: Could not retrieve the file. Please try again.
STEP_NOT_FOUND: The processing step was not found.
INVALID_STEP_TYPE: The processing step type is invalid.
DOCUMENT_CATEGORY_IN_USE: This category has documents and cannot be deleted.
